title: Indlela Yelifa Edabula Iimfunda zeSewula Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.title: Indlela Yelifa Edabula Iimfunda zeSewula Afrika
slides.lead: Asikhambeni sidabule zoke iimfunda ezilithoba begodu sifumane iindawo ezikhethekileko, iindaba nemikhuba engekwethu soke.

media.alt: Ibalazwe elinemibala leSewula Afrika elinamachaphaza atjengisa iindawo zelifa emazweni woke.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yamukela abafundi begodu uhlathulule umqondo 'wendlela yelifa' - ikhambo lomcabango elijamela eendaweni ezikhethekileko kilo yoke iSewula Afrika. Buza: ukhona na ovakatjhele imnyuziyamu, isakhiwo esidala, isikhumbuzo namtjhana indawo yemvelo? Indlela yelifa ihlanganisa iindawo lezi ndawonye. Nakuphela isifundo abafundi kufuze bakwazi ukuqamba iindawo zelifa eemfundeni ezihlukeneko begodu bathi kubayini sizivikela.

slides.title: Iyini ilifa?
slides.lead: Ilifa koke esikuzuza esikhathini esidlulileko begodu esifuna ukukugcina bekube likusasa.

blocks.text: **Ilifa** ziinto esizizuza ebantwini abaphila ngaphambi kwethu. Kungaba ziinto esingazithinta, njengeensakhiwo ezidala namathulusi, neento esingekhe sazithinta, njengeengoma, iindaba, iinlimi neenqophiso zokupheka. Ilifa lisisiza sazi bona singobani begodu sivela kuphi.

items: **Ilifa lemvelo** - iintaba, imilingo, imilambo neenlwane ezikhethekileko.
**Ilifa lesiko** - iinsakhiwo, iinkhumbuzo, ubuciko neento ezidala.
**Ilifa eliphilako** - iinlimi, umbhino, ukugida, ukudla nemigidi.

media.alt: Iimfanekiso ezintathu ezilula: intaba, isakhiwo esidala nesigubhu, ezitjengisa iindlela ezintathu zelifa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nikela iimbonelo eziqinileko zehlobo ngalinye ukwenzela bona abafundi beBanga 5 bakwazi ukuzicabanga: imvelo (iTable Mountain), isiko (ii-Union Buildings), okuphilako (ukubhina i-isicathamiya, ibraai yomndeni, ukurhatjha iinganekwane). Gandelela bona ilifa eliphilako liphila ebantwini, ingasi esakhiweni. Mema abafundi bona baqambe okukodwa kwelifa lomndeni wabo.

slides.title: Iindawo Zelifa Lephasi zeSewula Afrika
slides.lead: Ezinye zeendawo zethu zikhetheke khulu kangangobana iphasi loke lisiza ukuzitlhogomela.

blocks.text: **Indawo Yelifa Lephasi** yindawo ekhethwe yihlangano ebizwa nge-**UNESCO** ngombana iqakathekile ebantwini boke ephasini, ingasi enarheni yinye kwaphela. ISewula Afrika inendawo ezimalungana ne-**litjhumi** zezi, ezisabalele eemfundeni. Endleleni yethu sizabe sivakatjhela ezinye zazo.

items: Ezinye zikhethelwa imvelo, njengeentaba zeKapa neeDrakensberg.
Ezinye zikhethelwa umlando, njengeMapungubwe neRobben Island.
Ukuba serhelweni kutjho bona indawo ivikelekile ebantwaneni bekusasa.

media.alt: Ibheji eyirondo enephasi ngaphakathi, njengophawu lWelifa Lephasi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcina incazelo ilula: i-UNESCO liqembu leZizwe eziHlangeneko elenza uhlu olukhethekileko lweendawo eziqakatheke khulu ephasini. Awutlhogeki bona abafundi bafunde inani elingaqophileko - iphuzu kukuthi iSewula Afrika inothile ngeendawo ezinjalo. [SME] Sibawa uqinisekise inani lamva lweendawo zeSewula Afrika ze-UNESCO Zelifa Lephasi (bezilitjhumi ngo-2023) ngaphambi kobana isifundo siphume.

slides.title: Indawo yelifa yinye emfundeni nginye
slides.lead: Iimfunda ezilithoba, iindawo ezidumileko ezilithoba zokuvakatjhela endleleni yethu.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - imilingo enamathambo abantu adala khulu.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - umbuso wokuthoma weSewula Afrika nobhejane wegolide.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: Robben Island - ijele lapho uNelson Mandela bekabotjhwe khona.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Iintaba zeDrakensberg - iinkulungwana zemidwebo yeliwa yamaSan.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: Qunu neMthatha - iindawo zebuntwaneni bakaNelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Ilifa lamaSan nemibhalo yeliwa emidala eKaroo eyomileko.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Imizana yamaBasotho neVredefort Dome eseduze.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: Taung, lapho kwatholakala khona ikhanda lomntwana lakadeni.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Iintaba zeMakhonjwa zeBarberton - amanye wamatje amadala khulu ephasini.

slides.notes: Lokhu sisilayidi sesirhunyeziso. Funda umfunda nginye nendawo yayo ngokuzwakalako, begodu ukhombe malungana nalapho ikhona ebalazweni lomcabango (namtjhana ibalazwe lebodeni nawunalo). Tjela abafundi bona iimlayidi ezilandelako zizakusondeza ezinye zalezi. Ungabawa umfundi nginye ukukhetha indawo afuna ukuyivakatjhela khulu begodu athi kubayini. [SME] Qinisekisa bona ukuhlanganisa umfunda nendawo kufanele iklasi yakho; umfunda nginye unendawo zelifa ezinengi begodu abafundisi bangathanda iimbonelo zendawo.

slides.title: I-Cradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Iqembu lemilingo eseduze neJohannesburg lapho abososayensi bafumana khona amanye wamathambo womndeni wabantu amadala khulu ephasini.

blocks.text: Ee-**Sterkfontein Caves** abososayensi bembe **amafosili** - amathambo aphenduka amatje - wabantu bakade abaphila iimigidi yeminyaka eyadlulako. Okutholakele okudumileko kubandakanya ikhanda elibizwa nge-'Mrs Ples' nethambo elipheleleko ngaphandle kokuncani elibizwa nge-'Little Foot'. Kungakho indawo le ibizwa nge-*Cradle of Humankind*.

items: Umbhelebhele yilapho umntwana alala khona - ngalokho lokhu kufana nendawo yokubelethwa kwabantu.
Yindawo Yelifa Lephasi ngombana ilandisa indaba yabantu boke.
Usengavakatjhela imilingo nemnyuziyamu nanamhlanje.

media.alt: Ikroso lemgodini ongaphasi kwephasi elinekhanda lefosili ngaphakathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlathulula 'ifosili' ngokukhanyako: amathambo aphenduka amatje kancanikancani isikhathi eside khulu. I-Little Foot ne-Mrs Ples zenza isayensi ibonakale iqiniso ebafundini. Gcina umqondo wesikhathi esidephileko uthambile - 'kadeni khulu, ngaphambi kobana singacabange.' Buyisela esilayidini 5 sekhadi. [SME] Amalanga enziwe alula ngamabomu; qinisekisa naziphi iinombolo umfundisi azikhethako azozitjho ngokuzwakalako.

slides.title: Umbuso weMapungubwe
slides.lead: Kade khulu, egqumeni elikhandlelo enyakatho ekhethekileko, bekujame ikomkhulu lombuso wokuthoma weSewula Afrika.

blocks.text: Malungana neminyaka ema-700 ukuya ema-800 eyadlulako, i-**Mapungubwe** bekumbuso omatasi lapho abantu bebalima, bafuya iinkomo begodu barhwebelana ngegolide nomnyu neenarha ezikude. Ikosi beyihlala phezu kwegquma elikhethekileko. Ii-arkiyoloji ngokukhamba kwesikhathi zafumana iinto ezihle zegolide lapho, kubandakanya i-**bhejane omncani wegolide**.

items: Litjengisa bona imibuso emikhulu ye-Afrika beyikhona lapha ngaphambi kobana amaYurophu afike.
Ubhejane wegolide nje uphawu oludumileko lomlando weSewula Afrika.
IMapungubwe yiNdawo Yelifa Lephasi emngceleni ne-Zimbabwe ne-Botswana.

media.alt: Igquma elithe tere phezulu elinesimo esincani sebhejane wegolide phambili kwalo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Isilayidi lesi silungisa ingcabango eyaziwako ngokutjengisa umbuso we-Afrika onamandla nonothileko obekuphumelele kade khulu ngaphambi kwesikhathi sekoloni. Gandelela irhwebo (igolide nomnyu okukhamba kude ngelwandle) nobhejane wegolide njengomnotho. Abafundi beBanga 6 bafunda iMapungubwe ngokudephileko ngokukhamba kwesikhathi, ngalokho utjala imbewu. Gcina amalanga arondiwe ('malungana neminyaka ema-700-800 eyadlulako').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Isihlengana esincani elwandle eseduze neKapa esaba yijele elidumileko - nophawu lwekululeko.

blocks.text: Iminyaka eminengi i-**Robben Island** beyijele. Ngesikhathi se-apartheid, abarholi abalwela amalungelo alinganako babotjhwa lapha, kude nemindeni yabo. **UNelson Mandela** wahlala iminyaka eminengi eseleni elincani esihlengeni ngaphambi kobana akhululwe begodu ngokukhamba kwesikhathi waba mongameli wokuthoma weSewula Afrika okhethwe ngokwentando yenengi.

items: Namhlanje simnyuziyamu ofundisa abavakatjhi ngomtjhagalo wekululeko.
Abanye babarholi babotjhwa kade abarhelebha iindaba zabo.
Sisikhumbuza ukwazisa ikululeko namalungelo esinawo namhlanje.

media.alt: Isihlengana esincani esineliyithausi elwandle, neTable Mountain ekude.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha i-apartheid ngokuqophileko nangokulula eBangeni 5: abanye abantu baphathwa ngokungakalungi ngebanga lombala wesikhumba sabo, begodu abantu abanesibindi basebenza ukutjhugulula lokho. Sekela iRobben Island njengendawo yombhalo nethemba. Ihlanganise neLanga leKululeko / uNelson Mandela nangabe abafundi bayamazi. Balekela imininingwana ebuhlungu; nikela ilihlo esibindini nekuqakathekeni kwekululeko.

slides.title: Umdwebo Weliwa weDrakensberg
slides.lead: Phezulu eentabeni zeDrakensberg kunemidwebo eziinkulungwana eyenziwa maSan kade khulu.

blocks.text: I-**uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** yindawo yeentaba eziphakeme khulu zeSewula Afrika. Imilingo yayo neengubhorho zamatje ziqophe **imidwebo yeliwa** eziinkulungwana eyenziwa ma-**San** abazingeli. Bebadweba abantu, iimpofu, nekolo yabo ngamapendi wemvelo avela ematjeni, eentjalweni neenlwaneni.

items: Ibizo elithi uKhahlamba litjho 'isivikelo semikhonto' ngesiZulu.
Imidwebo inobudala beemakhulu neenkulungwana zeminyaka.
YiNdawo Yelifa Lephasi ngebanga lemvelo yayo nobuciko bayo obudala.

media.alt: Ubodo beliwa lemidwebo yeliwa yamaSan yempofu nomuntu ogijimako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ethula amaSan njengabantu bokuthoma beSewula Afrika neenciko ezihlakaniphileko neenlandi zeendaba. Hlathulula bona ipende beyenziwa njani ngeento zemvelo (ockre, ilahle, amanzi weentjalo, amafutha weenlwane). Impofu beyiyinlwane eqakathekileko khulu ekolweni yamaSan. Phatha ilifa lamaSan ngehlonipho - le mifanekiso ecwengileko emiphakathini eyabelethelwa yiyo. Ihlanganise nemibhalo yeliwa yeNorthern Cape esilayidini esilandelako.

slides.title: Idabula iKaroo neFree State
slides.lead: Iintopu ezintathu ezinye endleleni yethu - eEastern Cape, eNorthern Cape naseFree State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Amagquma aluhlaza lapho uNelson Mandela akhulela khona. Imnyuziyamu eMthatha ilandisa indaba yepilo yakhe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Igquma elembese ngemibhalo yeliwa emidala, elitlhogonyelwa yimiphakathi yamaSan namaKhoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - Basotho Village
blocks.text: Imnyuziyamu ephilako lapho ungabona khona izindlu zesintu zamaBasotho ezineembondo ezidwetjwe kuhle.

media.alt: Iindawo ezincani ezintathu: amagquma agirilikako, iliwa elinemibhalo, nendlu eyirondo edwetjiweko.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Iintopu ezintathu lezi zandisa indlela ukuya eemfundeni ezinengi neenhlobo ezinengi zelifa: indawo yokubelethwa komuntu (Eastern Cape), ubuciko obudala (imibhalo yeliwa yeNorthern Cape, ebazwe eliweni kunokudwetjwa phezu kwalo), nelifa eliphilako emzaneni osebenzako (Free State). Dweba umahluko phakathi kwemidwebo yeliwa (KZN) nemibhalo yeliwa (Northern Cape). [SME] Faka iindawo zendawo zeEastern Cape namtjhana zeFree State nange zifanele abafundi bakho khudlwana.

slides.title: Amatje amadala nomntwana omdala
slides.lead: Iintopu zethu ezimbili zokugcina zeemfunda ziya eNorth West naseMpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Ngo-1924 ikhanda lefosili lomntwana omdala, i-'Taung Child', latholakala lapha. Lisiza iphasi ukufunda bona abantu bathoma e-Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Iintaba zeMakhonjwa zinamanye wamatje amadala khulu ephasini - malungana neengidi ezi-3 500 zeminyaka ubudala - nje yiNdawo Yelifa Lephasi.

blocks.heading: Ibhonasi - Gauteng
blocks.text: IFreedom Park neConstitution Hill enyakatho zikhumbula umtjhagalo wamalungelo wabantu nentando yenengi.

media.alt: Ikhanda lefosili elincani eduze kweentaba ezidala ezinemitjhicilelo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: ITaung ibuyisela emutjini we-Cradle of Humankind - iSewula Afrika iphakathi endabeni yemvelaphi yabantu. IBarberton itjengisa ilifa lemvelo lehlobo elihlukileko: amatje amadala khulu. Ikhadi lebhonasi likuvumela ukutjho iindawo zentando yenengi zeGauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Qinisekisa umnyaka wokutholakala kwe-Taung Child (1924) nobudala obarondiweko bamatje (malungana neengidi ezi-3 500 zeminyaka) nange uzicaphuna ngokuzwakalako.

slides.title: Ilifa eliphilako neLanga leLifa
slides.lead: Ingasi loke ilifa elihlala lithule emnyuziyamu - elinye lalo liphila kilokho esikwenza qobe langa.

blocks.text: **Ilifa eliphilako** ldluliselwa kusukela ebomkhulu ukuya ebabelethini ukuya ebantwaneni. Libandakanya ii-**nlimi ezisemthethweni ezili-11**, iingoma zethu nokugida, iindaba zethu, iimbatho zethu nokudla esikuthandako. Umnyaka ngamunye nge-**24 kuNtaka** iSewula Afrika igidinga i-**Langa leLifa**, lapho sihlonipha woke amasiko wethu ahlukeneko.

items: Umbhino nokugida njenge-isicathamiya, ukugida kwamagumboots ne-amapiano.
Ukudla njengepapa, ibunny chow, amakoeksister, umngqusho nechakalaka.
Iindaba, iimbongo (izibongo) nemidlalo eyabelwana phakathi kwemindeni.

media.alt: Iimpawu zombhino, isigubhu nesitja sokudla ezijamela ilifa eliphilako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza lokhu kube sisilayidi esisebenzelana khulu. Bawa abafundi bona babelane ingoma, ukudla namtjhana indaba yemzini wabo. Gandelela bona ilifa eliphilako ngelawo woke begodu litjhuguluka njalo - i-amapiano lilifa elitjha elenziwa nje. Hlathulula iLanga leLifa ngokulula: ilanga lomphakathi lokugidinga woke amasiko wethu ndawonye. Qinisa ihlonipho ngokwahlukana.

slides.title: Ukutlhogomela ilifa lethu
slides.lead: Ilifa ngelethu soke, ngalokho soke kufuze sisize ukulivikela.

blocks.text: Nange iinsakhiwo ezidala ziwa, imidwebo yeliwa iyaphathwa, namtjhana iindaba azisatjelwa godu, ilifa lelo lilahleka unomphela. Kungakho sinee-**mnyuziyamu**, ii-**nkhumbuzo** nemithetho evikela iindawo ezikhethekileko. Kodwana nabantu bemihla ngemihla bayasiza - ngokuvakatjha, ukufunda nokudlulisela lokho abakwaziko.

items: Ungathinti namtjhana ulimaze ubuciko beliwa namtjhana iinto ezidala.
Vakatjhela iimnyuziyamu neendawo zelifa ukufunda iindaba zazo.
Lalela abadala begodu udlulisele iindaba zabo kwabanye.

media.alt: Izandla ezimbili ezibambe kancani isakhiwo esincani nesihlahla, zitjengisa ukutlhogomela ilifa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Letha isifundo emqondweni wesi 'ngalokho-ke' - ilifa libutjhataka begodu lingalahleka. Ihlanganise amathiphu amathathu nokuziphatha okuqiniseko ekhambweni lesikolo. Qinisa ihlonipho eendaweni ezicwengileko njengobuciko beliwa bamaSan. Ungabuza abafundi bona baqambe okukodwa abazokwenza ukuvikela ilifa. Lokhu kubeka imibuzo yokubuyekeza.

slides.title: Esikufundileko endleleni
slides.lead: Sidabule zoke iimfunda ezilithoba begodu sahlangana nelifa lemvelo, lesiko neliphilako.

blocks.text: Kusukela emilingweni ye-**Cradle of Humankind** ukuya embusweni we-**Mapungubwe**, ijele le-**Robben Island** neentaba ezidwetjiweko ze-**Drakensberg**, ilifa leSewula Afrika lilandisa indaba yabantu bayo boke. Ilifa ngelawo woke, begodu woke umuntu angasiza ukulivikela.

blocks.question: Qamba iindawo zelifa ezintathu ezihlukeneko begodu utjho bona nginye ikuyiphi imfunda.
Hlathulula umahluko phakathi kwelifa lemvelo, ilifa lesiko nelifa eliphilako. Nikela isibonelo esisodwa sehlobo ngalinye.
Kubayini kuqakathekile ukutlhogomela ilifa lethu? Nikela amabanga amabili.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi otloliweko namtjhana ipijadiso yeklasi. Umbuzo 1 uhlola ukukhumbula iindawo neemfunda; umbuzo 2 uhlola umqondo oqakathekileko weenhlobo ezintathu zelifa; umbuzo 3 uhlola ukuzwisisa bona kubayini ilifa liqakathekile. Ukwaba kwamamaki kulandela isitayela seSigaba Esiphakathi seCAPS. Phetha ngokukhumbuza abafundi bona nabo bayingcenye yelifa eliphilako leSewula Afrika.
